title: Proceeds of Crime (Seized Asset Fund Use) Order, 2026
act: The Proceeds of Crime Act, Chap. 11:27 — s. 58E(2)
citation: Legal Supplement Part B — Vol. 65, No. 41 — 25 March 2026
summary: The Minister of Finance has determined that the Seized Asset Fund may also be used to compensate victims of criminal offences. Subject to negative resolution of Parliament.
social_headline: Seized criminal assets can now compensate crime victims
social_post: Finance Minister D. Tancoo has ordered that the Seized Asset Fund — money confiscated under the Proceeds of Crime Act — may now be used to compensate victims of criminal offences. The Proceeds of Crime (Seized Asset Fund Use) Order, 2026 is subject to negative resolution of Parliament. Legal Notice No. 89 of 2026.

title: Detention Order — Shaquille Nurse
act: The Emergency Powers Regulations, 2026 — Schedule, para. 2
detained_at: Eastern Correctional Rehabilitation Centre, Santa Rosa, Arima
citation: Legal Supplement Part B — Vol. 65, No. 42 — 26 March 2026
summary: Preventive detention order under the Emergency Powers Regulations 2026, to prevent acts prejudicial to public safety.
social_headline: State of Emergency: Shaquille Nurse ordered into preventive detention
social_post: Minister of Homeland Security Roger Alexander has ordered the preventive detention of Shaquille Nurse, of George Street, Port-of-Spain, under the Emergency Powers Regulations 2026. He is to be held at the Eastern Correctional Rehabilitation Centre in Arima, to prevent acts prejudicial to public safety. Legal Notice No. 90 of 2026.
